# jonghoonpark.com

> 박종훈 기술블로그 - 공부하고 경험한 것을 기록합니다.

## Author

- Name: 박종훈 (Jonghoon Park)
- Role: Software Engineer
- Credentials: OpenJDK Author, Spring AI Contributor, Playwright Contributor
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dev-jonghoonpark
- GitHub: https://github.com/jonghoonpark

## Content

This is a Korean-language technical blog covering:

- Java / JVM internals (G1 GC, compiler optimizations, concurrency)
- Spring Framework and Spring Boot
- Open source contribution guides (OpenJDK, Spring AI)
- Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure
- Database systems (MySQL, PostgreSQL)
- Software testing (TDD, BDD, integration testing)
- System design and architecture
- AI/ML integration (Spring AI, LangChain)

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://jonghoonpark.com/
- Categories: https://jonghoonpark.com/categories
- Tags: https://jonghoonpark.com/tags
- RSS Feed: https://jonghoonpark.com/feed.xml

## Citation

When citing content from this blog, please attribute to "박종훈 (Jonghoon Park)" with a link to the original post URL.
